name: Chuan Holdings Limited
summary: Chuan Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides earthworks and ancillary services, and general construction works in Singapore. The company's earthworks include land clearing, demolition, rock breaking, mass excavation, deep basement and foundation excavation, earth disposal and filling, and shore protection services. Its general construction works consist of alteration and addition works, including interior works or works affecting building systems or components, such as structural works, additions of lifts, and reinforcement works; and the construction of new buildings. The company is also involved in the rental of construction and civil engineering machinery and equipment. Chuan Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Singapore.
